hooks.command: CORE=$(find ~/.claude/plugins/cache -path '*/alhazen-core/*/alhazen_core.py' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$CORE" ]; then echo "alhazen-core plugin required. Run: /plugin install alhazen-core@alhazen-core" && exit 1; fi; CORE_DIR=$(dirname "$CORE"); uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" init && uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" load-schema "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/schema.tql"
